<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error/issue

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- What should happen instead? -->


## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened? -->


## 📸 Screenshots or Video
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recording to help explain your problem -->


## 🔧 Environment Details
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- **Browser Version**: 
- **Operating System**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS, iOS, Android)

## 💡 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->
- Does this issue occur on multiple devices?
- Does this issue occur in other browsers?
- When did this start happening?


## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have tested on multiple browsers/devices
- [ ] I have provided clear reproduction steps
- [ ] I have included screenshots/videos if applicable
- [ ] I have provided environment details
